sections.label: Verse 1
lines: La sa un! “Jesuh in kong pai ding” ci,
A si tawh a gup mihing ta dingin;
kum a, hong uk ding a minthang hi,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lungdamin, la pha sa un nuam ding

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh hong pai ciang misite tho ding,
Vantung ah ei hong paipihna dingin,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jesuh hong pai ding a mi siangthote,
Leitung lungdamna nuam pia suk ding

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: A teelsa mihingte la to dingin;
Ngak in, lawpin, a kisa-in om
